headline: The Camp Dream GA calendar helps families and volunteers plan the year
subheadline: Summer Camp remains the anchor of the yearly schedule, with community updates, Camp Out events, volunteer coordination, and supporter communication filling the rest of the year.

sections.title: Volunteer confirmation timing
sections.description: Public volunteer information points to a response deadline around May 30, 2026 for summer service roles.

cta.heading: Move from dates into the pages that explain what camp feels like and how to get involved.
cta.body: The calendar gives timing. Summer Camp, Volunteer, and Contact pages help with the deeper decision.
